title: Author fabric-archive Skill template with verbatim heuristic and 5-type extraction prompt
description: Create packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md — single canonical SKILL.md mirroring templates/claude-skills/fabric-init/SKILL.md format (frontmatter: name/description/allowed-tools, body: Phase 0/1/2 workflow + Hard Rules with DISPLAY/WRITE split). Embed VERBATIM the layer classification heuristic from discussion.md L344-L347 (强 team / 强 personal / 默认 team), the 5-type extraction prompt template (model/decision/guideline/pitfall/process), the slug naming guideline (kebab-case 2-5 words 20-40 chars), and the decision tree for 'is this worth archiving'. Single SKILL.md serves both .claude/skills/ and .codex/skills/ install destinations.

files.change: YAML frontmatter (name: fabric-archive, description: one-paragraph WHEN-to-use describing Stop-hook trigger and manual invocation, allowed-tools: Read/Glob/Grep/Bash/mcp__fabric__fab_extract_knowledge). Body sections: Precondition (when to skip vs run), Phase 0 (collect candidates from session: events.jsonl tail + recent file edits + user-message themes), Phase 1 (LLM classifies each candidate: type∈{model,decision,guideline,pitfall,process}, layer∈{team,personal} via verbatim heuristic, slug per naming rules, single user-review batch), Phase 2 (call fab_extract_knowledge MCP per confirmed candidate). Hard Rules: DISPLAY rules (must show classification + layer reasoning), WRITE rules (MUST omit id from frontmatter, MUST default layer=team on ambiguity, NEVER write outside .fabric/knowledge/pending/). Protected tokens enumerate stable_id, knowledge_proposed event, .fabric/knowledge/pending/.

implementation: Read templates/claude-skills/fabric-init/SKILL.md as canonical 180-line format reference (frontmatter shape, Phase ordering, Hard Rules MUST/NEVER style)
Read .workflow/.analysis/ANL-2026-05-10-fabric-knowledge-pivot/discussion.md L344-L347 to extract verbatim layer heuristic text
Read discussion.md L355-L362 for hook threshold context (referenced but not embedded — hook script owns that)
Read discussion-followup.md L60 (slug naming) and L72 (pending frontmatter shape no-id rule)
Author SKILL.md frontmatter with three keys (name, description, allowed-tools) — description states 'Use when Stop-hook signals archive opportunity OR when user explicitly invokes /fabric-archive'
Author Phase 0 section: enumerate input sources (recent_paths from session, user_messages_summary, events.jsonl tail since last knowledge_proposed)

Author Phase 1 section: embed 5-type definitions as bullet list with example one-liners; embed verbatim heuristic text under '## Layer Classification Heuristic' heading; embed slug naming 5 rules; embed user-review batch template (```md fenced block with <type> <layer> <slug> <summary> placeholders)
Author Phase 2 section: instruct LLM to call mcp__fabric__fab_extract_knowledge with confirmed input, one call per candidate, do NOT batch into single call

Author Hard Rules section split into DISPLAY (MUST show layer reasoning per candidate) and WRITE (MUST omit id, MUST default team on ambiguity, NEVER write filesystem directly bypassing fab_extract_knowledge)
Verify length norm ~180 lines, bilingual headers acceptable
Commit: `feat(cli): add fabric-archive Skill template with layer heuristic and 5-type prompt`

reference.pattern: Claude-style SKILL.md format with Phase + Hard Rules
reference.examples: Mirror fabric-init/SKILL.md frontmatter (3 keys), Phase numbering (0/1/2), and Hard Rules MUST/NEVER syntax. Embed verbatim heuristic text without paraphrasing — the rationale for verbatim copy is rc.2 grill-followup convergence requirement to preserve user-locked decision text.

criteria: Body contains Phase 0 / Phase 1 / Phase 2 sections (verifiable by grep)
Layer classification heuristic text matches discussion.md L344-L347 character-for-character (zero paraphrase) — verifiable by diff
5 knowledge types listed exactly as model/decision/guideline/pitfall/process (singular nouns) — verifiable by grep
Slug naming guideline lists 5 rules: kebab-case, 2-5 words, 20-40 chars, semantic core only, unique within type+layer
Hard Rules section contains both DISPLAY and WRITE subsections with MUST/NEVER opening every line
Protected tokens enumerated: stable_id, knowledge_proposed, .fabric/knowledge/pending/, fab_extract_knowledge

rationale.chosen_approach: Single canonical claude-style SKILL.md, copied verbatim to both .claude/skills/ and .codex/skills/ install destinations
alternatives_considered: Two flavors (claude-rich + codex-light) — rejected: doubles maintenance, no observable behavior difference (LLMs read same content)
Separate prompt template MCP tool (fab_get_extraction_prompt) — rejected at discussion.md L327 'prompt 模板属于 Skill 内容'
Paraphrase heuristic text — rejected: violates verbatim convergence criterion from grill-followup
decision_factors: Existing fabric-init SKILL.md template provides exact 180-line format to mirror
User-locked decisions in discussion.md must be preserved verbatim to avoid semantic drift
Single template simplifies init.ts copy logic (one source path, two destinations)
rationale.tradeoffs: Codex skill convention historically prefers leaner format (28-line fabric-init/SKILL.md in codex-skills/) — accepting consistent-claude-style trade-off because rc.2 prioritizes content fidelity over per-client polish

manual_checks: Open SKILL.md and visually verify Phase ordering matches fabric-init reference
Diff layer-heuristic block against discussion.md L344-L347 — must be character-identical
Confirm Hard Rules use MUST/NEVER syntax on every line
success_metrics: SKILL.md frontmatter parses as valid YAML (test via TASK-006 contract test)
All 8 convergence criteria checkable by grep/diff
File is committable as-is (no placeholder TODO markers)
